title: Tennis research missing player-B recent form — stale H2H data
trigger: Harris vs Virtanen signal — model assessed Harris at 48% (market 23.26%) missing that Virtanen beat Harris 6-2 6-3 at Nottingham 1 one week prior

scope.structural_gap: 4 Tavily queries covered: preview, player-A form, H2H (no year), player-A injury. Player B recent results NEVER searched.

gaps: No query for player B recent form/results
H2H query has no year filter — returns aggregators with old data, misses recent tournament results
Single 'recent form' query too generic — returns ranking/career pages not match scores

harris_brief_evidence.key_fact_1: Harris ranked 142, Virtanen ranked 160 [TennisTemple — STALE: actual Virtanen ~116]
harris_brief_evidence.key_fact_2: Harris leads H2H 1-0, last match 2024 [MISSING: Virtanen beat Harris 6-2 6-3 at Nottingham 1 ~1 week prior]
harris_brief_evidence.injected_data: ATP form showed both 4-6 last 10 — aggregate form, not tournament-specific

changes: Added player-B dedicated recent results query (critical fix)
Added year to H2H query to prefer 2026 results over all-time records
Made form query more specific: 'results scores' over 'form results' to prefer match scores vs ranking pages
Combined injury query to both players (frees a slot)
Added optional 6th query using event_type for tournament-specific results

operator_action: None required — fix applied automatically (MOD-236). Monitor next tennis H2H signals for quality improvement.
